runTitle: Cloud Run Direct API + Langfuse - Additional AI boundary question evaluation
coveredSurfaces: additional-ai-qa supported metric filter: CPU >= 60 returned deterministic monitoring-metric-current (PASS)
additional-ai-qa supported ranking: memory lowest 3 returned deterministic monitoring-metric-ranking (PASS)
additional-ai-qa supported comparison: storage-nfs-dc1-01 vs db-mysql-dc1-primary disk comparison returned deterministic monitoring-metric-current (PASS)
additional-ai-qa supported group aggregation: DB vs cache average disk returned deterministic monitoring-metric-current (PASS)
additional-ai-qa supported historical peak: 24h CPU/load peak returned deterministic monitoring-peak-metric (PASS)
additional-ai-qa supported trend: disk increasing top 5 returned deterministic monitoring-metric-trend (PASS)
additional-ai-qa advisor action: safe read-only commands returned through Advisor Agent (PASS with wording/context improvement opportunity)
boundary unsupported Kubernetes pod restart: response stated the metric is not available in current monitoring data (PASS)
boundary off-domain weather without web: deterministic off-domain-guard refused realtime external answer and redirected to monitoring scope (PASS)
boundary off-domain company revenue forecast: Analyst response refused business revenue forecast and redirected to OpenManager monitoring scope (PASS with routing cost improvement opportunity)
boundary prompt injection: guard sanitized input to [blocked] and no instruction leak occurred (PASS with refusal wording polish)
boundary context seed: '지금 당장 조치 필요한 서버' returned deterministic warning target lb-haproxy-dc1-01 (PASS)
boundary network I/O ranking: '네트워크 I/O 상위 서버 3대' fell through to Metrics Query Agent and returned generic N/A server summary instead of network ranking (FAIL)
boundary unsupported GPU metric: 'GPU 사용률이 가장 높은 서버 3대' returned ordinary CPU/memory/disk style summary instead of unsupported-metric refusal (FAIL)
boundary unknown server: 'web-nginx-dc9-99 상태 알려줘' returned HTTP 500 instead of graceful not-found/clarifying answer (FAIL)
boundary ambiguous server: '서버 하나만 자세히 알려줘' returned generic fleet summary instead of asking for a server id or offering candidates (FAIL)
boundary context follow-up: after a single warning target, '그중 CPU가 높은 것만' ranked the whole fleet instead of preserving previous target scope (FAIL)
boundary RCA premise check: 'api-was-dc1-01 왜 CPU 높아?' showed current CPU reference only; it should explicitly say the current CPU is not high or ask for threshold/time window (FAIL/PARTIAL)
skippedSurfaces: Initial rapid 18-question direct API run triggered rate limiting after the first group; 429 responses were excluded from answer-quality counts and treated as rate-limit behavior evidence.
Browser AI sidebar stream was not repeated for this boundary run; direct Cloud Run API was used to isolate classifier/router behavior.
Vision/image and Reporter job surfaces were outside this targeted question-classification request.

expertAssessments.rationale: Core deterministic monitoring paths stayed strong, but boundary/refusal handling produced 6 failures out of 18 valid cases, including one HTTP 500 and several misleading fallbacks.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add targeted failing tests for unknown-server, unsupported-metric, network I/O ranking, ambiguous-server clarification, and contextual ranking scope before implementation.

expertAssessments.rationale: Langfuse and Cloud Run monitoring captured the additional boundary supervisor traces; codexBoundary traces were visible in /monitoring/traces and recent Langfuse summary.

usageChecks.summary: Rapid direct API testing triggered expected 429 rate limiting; slower boundary rerun completed valid answer-quality checks.
usageChecks.evidence: Cloud Run /api/ai/supervisor direct API responses and Langfuse supervisor trace summary

notes: Manual adjudication was applied because some automatic script matchers were intentionally loose and marked misleading fallback answers as pass.

Langfuse latest boundary summary after the rerun showed recent supervisor traces around 20:16-20:17 KST, including network I/O, GPU, Kubernetes, unknown-server, ambiguous-server, revenue, and security prompt cases.
Langfuse recent supervisor aggregate after the additional run: avg about 4.1s, p95 about 10.5s, failures 8, fallback 1, provider distribution deterministic 37, mistral 9, groq 3, rule-based 1.
Cloud Run /monitoring/traces?limit=50 returned status ok and showed codexBoundary=8 out of 40 recent traces.
Scorecard updated in Claude memory SSOT: Codex 30차 추가, v8.12.107, 91/100.
